positive: A minimalist and aesthetically pleasing illustration featuring a majestic forest animal (like a howling wolf or stag) integrated into a celestial mandala design. The animal silhouette should be strong and highly contrasted against a deep cosmic blue and burnt orange gradient background. Use intricate linework, dot work, and geometric patterns reminiscent of Art Nouveau and tribal art styles. Focus on negative space and clean edges for optimal print transferability. The composition must be centrally aligned, perfect for an apparel print. Style: highly detailed vector illustration, linocut aesthetic, Alphonse Mucha meets geometric tattoo art.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, cropped, amateur, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, photorealistic, ugly, messy
